summary: All 7 requirements are implemented in the diff. The two new service pages (VATRegistrationServicePage.tsx and PAYERegistrationServicePage.tsx) are created, routes are registered in App.tsx, the SiteLayout navigation is updated with VAT and PAYE links, the servicesCatalog.ts is updated with both entries under the 'compliance' category, and ServicesPage.tsx includes cards for both new services.
